name: opus-solutions
description: Opus Solutions — SaaS platform for Discord bot subscriptions.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @opus/core run build && npm --workspace @opus/ticket-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/voice-rooms-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/system-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/broadcast-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/orchestrator run build && npm --workspace @opus/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @opus/core run build && npm --workspace @opus/ticket-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/voice-rooms-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/system-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/broadcast-bot run build && npm --workspace @opus/orchestrator run typecheck && npm --workspace @opus/web run typecheck && npm --workspace @opus/core run typecheck
